talk_title: Keynotes 1 — Johannes Betz, Michael Milford, Aniket Bera, Hesheng Wang
speaker: Johannes Betz; Michael Milford; Aniket Bera; Hesheng Wang
speaker_affiliation: TU Munich; QUT; Purdue; Shanghai Jiao Tong
tc_relevance_reason: Two of four speakers are direct TC content: Betz on autonomous racing and AV motion planning, Milford on visual place recognition and navigation. Bera works on crowd/social navigation (TC-adjacent). Wang on visual servoing rounds it out. Strong attendance recommendation for TC members working on AVs or navigation.

speaker: Ken Goldberg
tc_relevance_reason: ICRA plenaries are the once-per-year community moments. Goldberg's work spans grasping, cloud robotics, and the algorithm/learning interface — broad TC adjacency. Even when the topic isn't a TC bullseye, the framing from a figure of Goldberg's stature is worth the hour.

talk_title: Keynotes 2 — Eric Diller, Fanny Ficuciello, Tiantian Xu, Haoyong Yu
speaker: Eric Diller; Fanny Ficuciello; Tiantian Xu; Haoyong Yu
tc_relevance_reason: Microrobotics, surgical/medical, micro/nano, rehab/wearable lineup. TC-adjacent at best — the control and planning angles exist in each subfield but the speaker selection here is on the application/system-design side rather than algorithm design. Worth a look if any of these application areas overlap with your work.
